title: Trouble in Tehran
summary:
Main
Image reference: assets/2026-01-19_trouble-in-tehran_img_istock-1184092411_e59424513d5b.jpg
Following two weeks of unrest, the oil market is again focused on Iran after a period of relative calm since last summer's 12‑day war. At the time of writing, the government appears to have quelled much of the unrest. Even so, the threat of potential US strikes, deep public dissatisfaction, disruption to Black Sea exports, and ongoing developments in Venezuela have kept the oil and shipping markets on edge.
